race.comment: BRAVALATANTE (14) turned in a nice effort to score two runs ago at Binnaway. Couldn't follow that up last time out when ninth over 1200m at Quirindi, beaten 7 lengths. Won't find this as tough and shapes as a major player. RIVOLI STAR (11) has been thereabouts without winning, the most recent effort a third at Tuncurry over 1305m when he was beaten 1.1 lengths. Will drift back but wind up late. Will prove tough to beat. ETOILES (9) was safely held when 11th last time out over 1200m at Quirindi, beaten 8 lengths. That followed a win at Armidale at the previous outing. Enjoys a drop in grade so he will prove hard to beat. MAGIC FLYER (1) could be ready to peak third up.
